verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Seven stars in the hand of Jesus, Were the messengers to each age, Now the seventh star has come and gone, And here is what he’s seen.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He’s seen the Bride come walking, The gowns were white as snow, In their hearts there was the Master’s love, And their faces there was a glow.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: By faith we’ll be in that number, The one’s He chose for His Bride, Though we fail each day in this world below, Some day we'll be by His side.
